name: La Cocina de Cristine
description: The restaurant of the boutique hotel Cristine Bedfor —awarded a Michelin Key in November 2024— on Maó's carrer de la Infanta, and one of Menorca's two newcomers among the Michelin Guide's recommended restaurants for 2026. Menorcan chef Pau Sintes signs market-driven cooking rooted in the territory: sourdough bread, red prawns, farmhouse sobrasada and fish from Sa Llotja, in a dining room with the soul of a guesthouse and a courtyard for dinner.

practicalInfo.acceso: Carrer de la Infanta 19, Maó (Cristine Bedfor hotel).
practicalInfo.horario: Confirm days and hours with the hotel before going.
practicalInfo.servicios: Book through the Cristine Bedfor hotel.

seo.description: La Cocina de Cristine (Maó): chef Pau Sintes's market cooking at the Cristine Bedfor hotel (one Michelin Key), Michelin Guide recommended in 2026.
